description: Runlayer is an enterprise AI platform for governing and enabling AI agents, especially around MCP-based tool access. It provides policy, identity, runtime security, audit logging, and deployment tooling for connecting agents to approved internal and third-party systems.
summary: Runlayer exposes a tenant-scoped REST management API, tenant-scoped MCP proxy surfaces for Runlayer’s self-MCP and plugin/connectors, and a Python-distributed `runlayer` CLI; auth is via Runlayer API keys, agent-account OAuth client credentials, or CLI login/device flow depending on surface.
